note: MULTI-CHILD (child + toddler). A delivery update for a household diaper/supply order names no child and concerns the family broadly — concerns_child_id must be null (do NOT guess between siblings). delivery_update is a one-way notice → surface_only.

input.rawContent:
From: shipping@everydaybasics.ca
Subject: Your order is out for delivery

Good news — your monthly household order (paper towels, diapers, wipes) is out for delivery and should arrive today between 2 and 6 PM. No action needed.
